requirements: Source and target entities are resolved.
Evidence text explicitly names the counterparty.
The relationship type and direction are supported by the cited text.
Evidence text names a counterparty and relationship cue.
At least one of direction, entity resolution, or formal-source confirmation is incomplete.
Relationship is inferred from exposure, shipments, industry context, or weak public references.
Must not be used as a verified customer or supplier fact.
Evidence does not support the claimed relation type or direction.
Counterparty is generic or unresolved in a high-confidence direct edge.
Sector exposure, partner, news, or shipment lead was misclassified as customer/supplier.
